mapper.sql: SELECT z.id, z.title, z.slug, z.subtitle, z.volume, z.issue_number, z.publication_year, z.publisher, z.description, z.file_url, z.cover_image_url, z.file_format, z.file_size, z.view_count, z.read_count, z.download_count, z.total_word, z.total_pages, z.estimated_read_time, z.is_active, z.is_featured, z.published_at, z.category, z.source, z.difficulty_level, z.created_at, z.updated_at, l.name AS language_name, cs.name AS copyright_status_name, COALESCE(AVG(zr.rating), 0) AS average_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT zr.id) AS total_ratings FROM zines z LEFT JOIN languages l ON l.id = z.language_id LEFT JOIN copyright_statuses cs ON cs.id = z.copyright_status_id LEFT JOIN zine_ratings zr ON zr.zine_id = z.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zines ( title, slug, subtitle, volume, issue_number, publication_year, publisher, language_id, description, file_url, file_url_archive, file_path, cover_image_url, file_format, file_size, copyright_status_id, view_count, read_count, download_count, total_word, total_pages, estimated_read_time, is_active, is_featured, published_at, category, source, difficulty_level, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{slug}, #{subtitle}, #{volume}, #{issueNumber}, #{publicationYear}, #{publisher}, #{languageId}, #{description}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileUrlArchive}, #{filePath}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{fileFormat}, #{fileSize}, #{copyrightStatusId}, #{viewCount}, #{readCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{totalWord}, #{totalPages}, #{estimatedReadTime}, #{isActive}, #{isFeatured}, #{publishedAt}, #{category}, #{source}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE zines SET title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, volume = #{volume}, issue_number = #{issueNumber}, publication_year = #{publicationYear}, publisher = #{publisher}, language_id = #{languageId}, description = #{description}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_url_archive = #{fileUrlArchive}, file_path = #{filePath}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, file_format = #{fileFormat}, file_size = #{fileSize}, copyright_status_id = #{copyrightStatusId}, total_word = #{totalWord}, total_pages = #{totalPages}, estimated_read_time = #{estimatedReadTime}, is_active = #{isActive}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, category = #{category}, source = #{source}, difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zines WHERE slug = #{slug} AND is_active = true
SELECT id FROM zines WHERE slug = #{slug}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zines WHERE slug = #{slug}
WHERE z.slug = #{slug} GROUP BY z.id, l.name, cs.name

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT z.id) FROM zines z LEFT JOIN zine_ratings zr ON zr.zine_id = z.id
AND ( SELECT COALESCE(AVG(zr2.rating), 0) FROM zine_ratings zr2 WHERE zr2.zine_id = z.id ) >= #{criteria.minRating}
mapper.update: UPDATE zines SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE slug = #{slug}
UPDATE zines SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{zineId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO zine_views (zine_id, slug, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, viewer_hash, action_type, created_at) VALUES (#{zineId}, #{slug}, #{userId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{viewerHash}, #{actionType}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (zine_id, user_id, action_type) WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING
ON CONFLICT (viewer_hash, action_type) WHERE user_id IS NULL DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO zine_genres (zine_id, genre_id) VALUES (#{zineId}, #{genreId}) ON CONFLICT (zine_id, genre_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO zine_authors (zine_id, author_id) VALUES (#{zineId}, #{authorId}) ON CONFLICT (zine_id, author_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO zine_contributors (zine_id, contributor_id, role) VALUES (#{zineId}, #{contributorId}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT (zine_id, contributor_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id, slug, title, updated_at FROM zines WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT CONCAT('/zines/', #{zineSlug}, '/read/', bc.chapter_order) FROM book_chapters bc JOIN zines z ON z.id = bc.book_id WHERE z.slug = #{zineSlug} AND bc.entity_type = 'ZINE' AND bc.is_active = true ORDER BY bc.chapter_order
mapper.update: UPDATE zines SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE id = #{zineId}
